title: MAINTAINER: parse_params() discards deserialization errors at debug log, can't diagnose relay protocol bugs
description: In dispatcher.rs lines 91-100, parse_params() returns None on deserialization failure and logs at debug level. If a relay sends a malformed notification (e.g., wrong types in a json-rpc update), the bot silently ignores it with no way to diagnose the issue without re-running at debug log level. In 6 months, if the relay's protocol changes and a notification breaks, maintainers won't have visibility into what the relay is sending. Fix: log at warn level when a known method has unparseable params (indicates a relay/client version mismatch), keep debug for truly unknown methods.
